request: We have 6 open bugs in our checkout flow (2 are flaky e2e tests, 1 is a wire-format overflow, 3 are validation gaps). Build a prioritized task force to fix them.
Review our authentication module under src/auth for security issues and tell me which to fix first and how.
Our service crashes on startup in CI but runs fine locally. Help me reproduce it and pin the root cause.
Design a rate limiter for our public API that must keep working during a single-region outage.
We are shipping an LLM-backed feature to EU users next month. What compliance guardrails and controls do we need in place?
